steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The clue is the phrase “Pheus truly shines,” followed by the explanation that he becomes a heightened version of himself when performing.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the clue
steps.content:
“Truly” intensifies “shines,” showing that Pheus genuinely excels, so it means “really.”
A, B, and C each suggest the opposite or unrelated ideas—obediently, scarcely, impolitely—none fit the context of shining.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
